title: Lesson 93: (Grammar) - hey; you; hold on; yo

intro_cards.title: Sentence Ender よ: Assertion
intro_cards.body:
よ is a sentence-final particle that asserts information — signaling something you believe the listener doesn't know.

• それは違いますよ。(That is wrong, you know.)
• もう時間ですよ。(It's already time!)
• 大丈夫ですよ。(It's okay, I'm telling you.)

よ can sound assertive or pushy if overused — tone matters.

Combined with ね:
よね = assertion + seeking agreement:
• そうですよね。(That's right, isn't it.)
